name: Taiwan Taffeta Fabric Co., Ltd.
summary: Taiwan Taffeta Fabric Co., Ltd. produces and sells polyester fabrics in Taiwan. The company provides polyester, nylon, and interlaced/blended materials that are used in suits, outdoor, urban leisure, and home decoration applications. It also produces suede, jacquard, lightweight, heavy cloth, printed, flame retardant, waterproof and breathable, sandwich cloth, and anti-UV fabrics, as well as quick-drying and keep warm fabrics. Taiwan Taffeta Fabric Co., Ltd. was founded in 1973 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.
